title: execute_csharp: list truncation emits an explicit elided count

steps.title: Prerequisites
steps.body: Bridge running. Optional, automated-covered serialization check: confirm the serializer caps large lists at max_items and reports the elided count. List truncation is asserted by the automated test below; this scenario is a runnable confidence pass against the live serializer.

steps.title: Return a large list and cap it
Expected outcomes
items: the elided (truncated) count is explicit and equals total - kept
a list under the cap returns a plain array with no truncated field

reset.note: execute_csharp is transient (no disk artifact); nothing is reverted on disk.
